author: James M.
review: Best car buying experience I've ever had. The team at SQ Motors went above and beyond to find me the exact Camry I was looking for. No pressure, honest pricing, and they even helped me secure great financing. Highly recommend!

author: Sarah T.
review: I drove 3 hours to visit SQ Motors and it was absolutely worth it. The inventory was impressive and the staff knew their stuff. Got a fair price on my Civic and the whole process took less than 2 hours.

author: Mike R.
review: Transparent, professional, and no hidden fees. They showed me the carfax upfront and were honest about the vehicle history. The warranty options they offered gave me real peace of mind. Will definitely be back for my next ride.

author: Jennifer L.
review: As a first-time buyer, I was nervous about the process. The team at SQ Motors made everything simple and explained every step. They found me a Fusion in perfect condition within my budget. Couldn't be happier!

author: David K.
review: Finally found an Elantra that wasn't marked up to the moon. SQ Motors has fair prices and a no-nonsense approach. The car was exactly as described. Five stars across the board.

author: Amanda S.
review: I've bought from big dealerships before and hated the experience. SQ Motors is different—smaller, personal, and they actually listen to what you want. Got a beautiful Malibu and felt respected throughout.

author: Robert H.
review: Perfect family car! SQ Motors had the Optima I'd been hunting for months. The team was knowledgeable about the car's specs and history. Financing was smooth. These folks know reliable cars.

author: Emily W.
review: Great selection of reliable sedans at honest prices. I was on a tighter budget and they found me a well-maintained Mazda6 that runs like a dream. No pushy sales tactics—just genuine help. Thank you!

author: Chris B.
review: Needed something that could fit the family but still had good fuel economy. The RAV4 was the perfect fit. SQ Motors made the trade-in process painless and the numbers worked out great. Family approved!

author: Lisa P.
review: Third car I've bought from SQ Motors over the years. That should tell you something. Consistently fair, consistently professional. They've earned my loyalty and I'll keep coming back.

author: Kevin D.
review: Needed something reliable for my commute and occasional camping trips. The Outback was perfect. SQ Motors had it at a reasonable price when everyone else was gouging. The whole team understood what I was looking for. Top-notch experience.

author: Michelle A.
review: Didn't think I could afford a reliable SUV, but SQ Motors worked with me on financing and found options I didn't know existed. Now I'm driving a great Escape. They really do want to put people in cars they love.

author: Jason L.
review: Came for a sedan, left with a Rogue. The team helped me realize what would actually fit my needs—cargo space, family trips, and good MPG. No pressure, just good advice. The Rogue is perfect!

author: Nicole F.
review: Moved to Springfield and needed a reliable car fast. SQ Motors had several options ready to go. Picked up a clean Tucson in one afternoon. Friendly folks, clean facility, no drama. Exactly what I needed.

author: Brian T.
review: The Jetta is an absolute commuter dream. SQ Motors had the exact color and options I wanted. Test drive was thorough, paperwork was quick. If you're in the market for a reliable daily driver, start here.
